name: @forgeax/hello-tonemap
description: Reinhard-extended tonemap opt-in exemplar (feat-20260519-tonemap-reinhard-mvp / M4 / T-M4.1).

forgeax._comment: smokeInvocation = self-contained SSOT (mirrors hello-cube / hello-room). hello-tonemap exercises Camera tonemap='reinhard-extended' end-to-end (HDR rgba16float target -> fullscreen tonemap pass -> swap-chain) + AC-07 (no integer-white burn) + AC-08 (highlight readback in (0.3, 1.0)).

bundle-size.reason: vite app bundle (dist/assets) shape is downstream of @forgeax/engine-runtime + @forgeax/engine-rhi-webgpu sizes already tracked at the package level

fps.reason: tonemap MVP exemplar; fps no-regression covered by hello-cube/hello-room/hello-app gates that run the default zero-overhead path. AC-15 OOS: explicit hello-tonemap fps baseline deferred until additional tonemap modes (ACES / AgX) ship and a per-mode regression panel becomes meaningful.

bench.reason: tonemap exemplar; bench focus stays on @forgeax/engine-math + pixel-parity

spike-report.reason: not a spike app; this is the M4 hello-tonemap opt-in exemplar
